title: stelis neowerneri
intro: Stelis neowerneri, also known as the orchid bee plant, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis neowerneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
